suggestions.title: Document diagnostics tier fallback and language dispatch in McpIdeTools
suggestions.rationale: The mcp-server page references McpIdeTools as a tool group but does not explain the four-tier diagnostics fallback (inspection → CompilerManager → build-tool subprocess) or how LanguageSupportRegistry dispatches language-aware tools like ScalaPsiBridge. These are load-bearing architectural details now that Scala support and tiered diagnostics have been added.

suggestions.title: Add LanguageSupport registry concept page
suggestions.rationale: No wiki page covers LanguageSupport, LanguageSupportRegistry, or ScalaPluginPsiBridge despite scala-support making it a real subsystem.

suggestions.title: Add BuildToolRegistry concept page
suggestions.rationale: Gradle/Maven/Mill/Sbt adapters and BuildToolRegistry.detectPrimary/detectAll feed get_diagnostics tier 4 and FileCollector. Coverage is one bullet in mcp-server.md; detection order, multi-build-tool projects, and compileCommandFor semantics are undocumented.

suggestions.title: Add tool approval modes concept page
suggestions.rationale: ToolApprovalMode (allow-all / allow-safe / confirm-all / Ask unlisted) and ToolApprovalModeUi gate every MCP tool call and have user-visible settings UX. permission-prompt.md mentions modes only in passing; the mode enum, allow-list semantics, and .claude/settings.json interaction are undocumented.

suggestions.title: Document team-mode wiki layout
suggestions.rationale: drift-detection.md only mentions single .drift-state.json. Team mode splits into team-shared .wiki-state.json and per-user wiki-state.local.json; WikiLocator and /wiki-relocate are uncovered.

suggestions.title: Document skill-catalog injection into system prompt
suggestions.rationale: The commands-and-skills page covers skill discovery (SkillScanner) and the /skills picker, but not how skills are surfaced to Claude: buildSkillCatalogPrompt in CliProcess emits a static catalog gated by the preloadSkillCatalog setting, with a fixed "When a skill matches the user's task, suggest invoking it" instruction. This is the integration seam for any task-based skill-recommendation work.

suggestions.title: Document prompt-constant extraction via PromptResource
suggestions.rationale: cli-bridge documents the file-based delivery and 32 KB ordering invariants but not that WIKI_LIBRARIAN_PROMPT/MCP_SYSTEM_PROMPT/EDIT_REVIEW_PROMPT are inline companion constants, nor the established PromptResource.load + {{placeholder}} extraction pattern (baseline-defaults, WikiAgentsArg) a refactor must follow. A future "extract prompts to resources" question would have nothing to point at for the seam or its test contracts.

suggestions.title: Document subagent result path and 500-char tool-output cap
suggestions.rationale: The chat-ui page does not explain that Task/Agent subagent results travel the ordinary ToolUse/ToolResult path (distinct from CliEvent.TaskEvent/TaskWidgetController, which is the todo widget), nor that MessageRenderer.renderToolResult truncates rendered output to 500 chars (MessageRenderer.kt:485). This caused confusion in a truncation debugging question.
